title: Creamy Chicken & Chorizo Pasta
summary: Leftovers from our Air Fryer Smoky Chicken & Chorizo batch recipe folded through silky mascarpone pasta, topped with cheese, crispy chicken skin and fresh chives. Yes, it’s as good as it sounds.

method.description: Make the Air Fryer Smoky Chicken & Chorizo.
Peel the skin off the leftover chicken and place it into the air fryer at 190°C for 5-10 mins until crispy.
Bring a large saucepan of salted water to the boil. Add the pasta and cook for 2 mins under the packet timing for al dente.

Meanwhile, shred the chicken, grate the cheddar and finely slice the chives. Warm the chicken and chorizo mix in a saucepan set over a low heat. Stir through the mascarpone until it melts into a creamy sauce. Season with salt and black pepper.

Drain the pasta, reserving a mugful of the cooking water. Add the pasta to the sauce along with half of the grated cheddar. Stir through until piping hot and creamy, adding a splash of pasta water to loosen, if needed.
Divide between bowls. Top with the remaining cheddar, sliced chives and crumbled crispy chicken skin.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
